name: Alkaser-Recon-Pipeline
summary: 🦅 ALKASER — Bug Bounty Recon & Exploitation Pipeline

documentation.readme: 🦅 ALKASER — Bug Bounty Recon & Exploitation Pipeline
usage_sections: Sudden 403 Access Denied pages referencing edgesuite.net / edgekey.net (Akamai), or Cloudflare's "Attention Required" page.

arguments.name: --ffuf-delay
arguments.description: Delay between ffuf requests: fixed ("0.5") or random range ("0.3-1.0") (default: none)

arguments.name: --force-fuzz
arguments.description: Force ffuf even if alive hosts exceed --fuzz-threshold

arguments.name: --fuzz-threshold
arguments.description: Auto-skip ffuf if alive hosts exceed N (default: 20)

arguments.name: --rate-limit
arguments.description: Max requests/sec for httpx & Nuclei baseline (default: 50)

arguments.name: --skip-missing
arguments.description: Continue even if some tools are absent

arguments.name: --domain
arguments.description: Active Directory or Windows domain name.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --interface
arguments.description: Network interface to bind to (e.g. wlan0mon, eth0).

arguments.name: --verbose
arguments.description: Increase log verbosity (repeatable for higher levels).

function_signatures.name: run_cmd
function_signatures.signature:
def run_cmd(cmd: list[str],
    output_file: Optional[Path] = None,
    stdin_data: Optional[str]   = None,
    label: str = "",
    capture: bool = False,
    silent: bool = False,)

examples: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y python3 python3-pip git

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with thewhiteh4t/seeker (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with iojw/socialscan (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with devanshbatham/ParamSpider (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web] in the OSINT category. Fits when the engagement needs: 🦅 ALKASER — Bug Bounty Recon & Exploitation Pipeline.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: 🦅 ALKASER — Bug Bounty Recon & Exploitation Pipeline.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/alkaserGG/Alkaser-Recon-Pipeline.git; pip3 install -r requirements.txt. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `hosts > threshold,                      (run in parallel)`. Further invocations from upstream: `throttled via --ffuf-threads/`; `sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y python3 python3-pip git`. 🦅 ALKASER — Bug Bounty Recon & Exploitation Pipeline.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.
